translation.text: (شدة‎ šidda) to be or become firm, fast, solid, hard, strong, vigorous, robust, vehement, violent, intense; šadda u i (šadd) to make firm, hard, strong, solidify, harden, brace (ھـ‎ s. th.), strengthen, fortify (ه‎ , ھـ‎ s. o., s. th.); to tighten, pull taut, draw tight (ھـ‎ s. th., e. g., the bow); to fasten, tie, bind (إلى‎ or ھـ‎ على‎ s. th. on, to), lash (ھـ‎ على‎ s. th. on); to saddle (على‎ an animal); to put emphasis (كلمة‎ على‎ ‘alā kalimatin on word), emphasize, stress (كلمة‎ على‎ a word); to pull, drag (من‎ ه‎ s. o. by, e.g., by his coat); to charge, launch an attack (على‎ against, on), assault, attack (على‎ s. o., s. th.); to press (على‎ s. th. or upon s. th.), exert pressure (على‎ on); to insist (في‎ on s. th.) ; ما‎ شد‎ šadda-mā and ما‎ لشد‎ (la-šadda) (with foll. vers) how much ...! very often ...; very much, exceedingly, vehemently, violently; ما‎ لشد‎ اذ‎ سرورنا‎ كان‎ tremendous was our joy when …; ازره‎ شد‎ (azrahū) or ازره‎ من‎ شد‎ to help, support, encourage, back up s. o.; ازره‎ شد‎ (azruhū) to be energetic, vigorous, courageous; الزمام‎ شد‎ to tighten the reins, master the situation; عزائمه‎ من‎ شد‎ to strengthen s. o.’s determination; شدعضده‎ (‘aḍudahū) to strengthen, support, bolster, assist s. o.; راحلته‎ على‎ شد‎ (he saddled his female riding camel ) = he started out on the journey; راحلته‎ على‎ شد‎ to start out, depart, leave (إلى‎ for); وثاقه‎ شد‎ (waṯāqahū) to shackle, fetter s. o.; على‎ يده‎ شد‎ (yadahū) to adhere, cling to s. th.; يديه‎ على‎ شد‎ (yadaihi) to clasp s. o.’s hands

thing; something; (with neg.) nothing ; من‎ شيء‎ a little, a certain (amount of), a considerable ...; النشاط‎ من‎ شيء‎ (našāṭ) some activity; القلق‎ من‎ شيء‎ (qalaq) some uneasiness, some anxiety; الجھد‎ من‎ شيء‎ بدون‎ (jahd) without any effort at all; آخر‎ شيء‎ وذاك‎ شيء‎ ھذا‎ (āḵar) this and that are two entirely different things (or matters); الأمر‎ في‎ شيء‎ there is s. th. wrong, there is a fly in the ointment; الشيء‎ بعض‎ ba‘ḍ š. to a certain extent, a little, somewhat; في‎ , بشيء‎ شيء‎ in negative sentences: not in any way; in no way, by no means, not at all, not in the least; من‎ كثير‎ شيء‎ على‎ very, extremely, e. g., البساطة‎ من‎ كثير‎ شيء‎ على‎ (basāṭa) very simple; الكثير‎ الشيء‎ the most; ب‎ شيء‎ اشبه‎ (ašbahu šai’in) very much like ...;شيء‎ بعد‎ شيئا‎ or فشيئا‎ شيئا‎ (fa-šai’an) bit by bit, one after the other, by and by, gradually; شيء‎ لا‎ a nothing, nil, nonentity; nothing (in sport scoring); اللاشيء‎ the nothing; شيء‎ لا‎ nothing (as object); ... لا‎ اليسير‎ الشيء‎ غير‎ (gair š-šai’ l-yasīr) only very little;بشيء‎ ليس‎ it is nothing, it is of no consequence; ذلك‎ من‎ شيء‎ في‎ ھذا‎ ليس‎ this has absolutely nothing to do with that

matter, affair, concern, business; circumstances, state of affaire, case; nature, character, quality, kind; situation, condition, state; significance; importance, consequence; standing, prestige, rank; cranial future; pl. شؤون‎ tears; ša’na like, as ; بشأن‎ bi-ša’ni regarding, with regard or respect to, relating to, pertaining to, concerning, as to, about; شأنه‎ جل‎ (jalla) the Sublime (of God);الاجتماعية‎ الشؤون‎ وزارة‎ Ministry of Social Affairs; الخارجية‎ الشؤون‎ (ḵārijīya)foreign affairs; الشأن‎ ذو‎, f. الشأن‎ ذات‎ the responsible man, the man in charge, the man directly concerned with the matter; الشأن‎ اولو‎ ulū š-š. and الشأن‎ ذوو‎ ḏawū š-š. the influential people, the competent people; the concerned with the matter; الحياة‎ شؤون‎ š. al-ḥayāh worldly affairs; الشأن‎ خطير‎ of great importance; شأن‎ ذو‎ significant, important; الشأن‎ رفيع‎ high- ranking; (formerly, Tun.) title of members of the Bey’s family; الشأن‎ صاحب‎ the one concorned; الشأن‎ اصحاب‎ those concerned; the important, influential people; بالشؤون‎ مكلف‎ (mukallaf) chargé d’affaires (dipl.); الـ‎ شأن‎ ذلك‎ في‎ شأنه‎... (ša’nuhū …ša’nu l-...) in this matter he fares just as the …, he is, in this respect, in the same situation as the ...; شأنه‎ ھذا‎ رجل‎ (ša’nuhū) a man whose situation is this, a man who can be described as ..., a man in this situation; شأنك‎ ša’naka or وشأنك‎ انت‎ anta wa-ša’naka please your-self! do as you like! شأنك‎ تريد‎ وما‎ (ša’naka) do as you please! just as you wish! وشأني‎ دعني (da‘nī) let me alone! وشأنه‎ تركه‎ tarakahū wa-ša’nahū to let s. o. alone; to let s. o. go; not to pay any attention to s. o.;شأن‎ في‎ ھو‎ he is concerned with a matter; شأنه‎ ھذا‎ that’s his affair; شأنك‎ ما‎ what’s the matter with you? what do you want? وھذا‎ شأنك‎ ما‎ what have you got to do with this? what business of yours is this? والأمر‎ شأنه‎ ما‎ (amra) what has he got to do with the matter?ذلك‎ في‎ شأني‎ ما‎ what have I got to do with that? what business of mine is that? ھذا‎ في‎ لك‎ شأن‎ اي‎ (ayyu ša’nin) what business of yours is this? what’s that to you? ذلك‎ في‎ شأن‎ له‎ he has s. th. to do with this, he has a hand in this; ذلك‎ في‎ له‎ شأن‎ لا‎ (ša’na) he hasn’t anything to do with this, he has no part in this; ذلك‎ في‎ شأن‎ لي‎ ليس‎ I shall have nothing to do with that, that is none of my business, I shan’t meddle in that; ذلك‎ في‎ لي‎ شأن‎ لا‎ (ša’na) I haven’t anything to do with it, it's none of my business; آخر‎ شأن‎ معه‎ لي‎ (āḵar) I still have a bone to pick with him; شأنه‎ لبعض‎ ذھب‎ (li-ba‘ḍi ša’nihī) he attended to a task; he went to do s. th.; شأنه‎ إلى‎ انصرف‎ (inṣarafa) he left to do his work; شأنھا‎ من‎ اصلحت‎ (aṣlaḥat) she made herself up; شأنه‎ اھمل‎ ahmala ša’nahū he neglected him; شأنه‎ ذلك‎ that is his habit; دائما‎ شأنه‎ ھذا‎ he is always that way; في‎ شأنه‎ (ša’nahū) as he used to do in ...;من‎ مع‎ شأنه‎ ... (ša’nahū) as he used to deal with people who ...; شأنه‎ من‎ كان‎ it was his wont, he used to ...; من‎ ان‎ شأنه‎ it is in his (its) nature that ..., he (it) tends to ...; it is his business to ...; من‎ ليس‎ ان‎ شأنه‎ it is not his affair or business to ...; it is inappropriate for him to ...; it does not tend to …; is not conducive to ...; شأنا‎ الرجل‎ لھذا‎ ان ‎ (rajuli) there is a man to keep an eye on, this is an important man; there is s. th. about this man! شؤون‎ خلقه‎ في‎ لله‎ (ḵalqihī) God has created all kinds of things (meaning: strange things can happen in this world!)
